title: Descriptor-backed modeling batch receipts
description: Track the actual descriptor-backed corpus modeling batch receipts after the earlier bead close reason was malformed.

title: Batch apply descriptor-backed corpus modeling
description: Add repeatable modeling seed/application script and advance descriptor-backed corpus entries with deterministic fixture and agentic run evidence.
close_reason: Superseded by direct close below

title: Expand ranked CLI corpus beyond 10k
description: Add objective tail star partitions, fetch/materialize the ranked CLI/tool corpus beyond 10k candidates, and update corpus manifest invariants.
close_reason: Added 25..50 star tail partitions, fetched 20 live partitions with 700 cache hits and 0 retries, materialized 11,182 ranked CLI/tool candidates from 720/720 partitions, redaction check passed, corpus manifest/fmt/clippy gates passed.

title: Broaden CLI corpus discovery dimensions
description: Expand corpus discovery beyond the exhausted topic/language/star grid by adding objective keyword/star partitions, then fetch/materialize new partitions and verify progress toward the 10,000 repository target.
close_reason: Added 60 keyword/star partitions beyond the exhausted topic grid, fetched them with 60 live fetches and 0 retries, and materialized 700/700 partitions. Corpus grew from 6,800 to 9,713 entries; still 287 short of 10k. Gates passed.

title: Fetch final generated CLI corpus shard
description: Fetch the remaining shard 581..640 of the generated GitHub CLI corpus query grid, materialize the combined cached corpus, and verify whether the current generated grid reaches the 10,000 repository target.
close_reason: Fetched final generated-grid shard 581..640 plus missing partitions 267..268; cache-only materialization now covers 640/640 partitions and yields 6,800 unique repos. This proves the current generated grid is below the 10k target and needs broader discovery strategy. Gates passed.

title: Fetch CLI corpus shard 529 to 580
description: Fetch the next bounded shard of the generated GitHub CLI corpus query grid, materialize the combined cached corpus, and verify progress toward the 10,000 repository target.
close_reason: Fetched shard 529..580 with 52 live fetches and 6 retries; cache-only combined materialization reached 6,740 entries from 578/640 cached partitions. Unique corpus growth was only +1, but discovery coverage advanced. Gates passed.

title: Fetch CLI corpus shard 477 to 528
description: Fetch the next bounded shard of the generated GitHub CLI corpus query grid, materialize the combined cached corpus, and verify progress toward the 10,000 repository target.
close_reason: Fetched shard 477..528 with 52 live fetches and 5 retries; cache-only combined materialization grew corpus to 6,739 entries from 526/640 cached partitions. Gates passed.

title: Fetch CLI corpus shard 425 to 476
description: Fetch the next bounded shard of the generated GitHub CLI corpus query grid, materialize the combined cached corpus, and verify progress toward the 10,000 repository target.
close_reason: Fetched shard 425..476 with 52 live fetches and 5 retries; cache-only combined materialization grew corpus to 6,695 entries from 474/640 cached partitions. Gates passed.

title: Fetch CLI corpus shard 373 to 424
description: Fetch the next bounded shard of the generated GitHub CLI corpus query grid, materialize the combined cached corpus, and verify progress toward the 10,000 repository target.
close_reason: Fetched shard 373..424 with 52 live fetches and 5 retries; cache-only combined materialization grew corpus to 6,394 entries from 422/640 cached partitions. Gates passed.

title: Fetch next CLI corpus shard
description: Fetch another bounded shard of the generated GitHub CLI corpus query grid, materialize the combined cached corpus, and verify progress toward the requested 10,000 repository inventory without claiming completion.
close_reason: Fetched shard 321..372 with 1 cache hit, 51 live fetches, 4 retries; cache-only combined materialization grew corpus to 6,205 entries from 370/640 cached partitions. Gates passed.

title: Shard corpus GitHub fetch runs
description: Add start/end partition controls to the corpus fetcher so the generated 640-partition GitHub discovery grid can be fetched in bounded resumable shards under rate limits, then fetch the next shard toward the 10k corpus target.
close_reason: Added 1-based start/end partition controls and a guard against bounded live shards overwriting the default seed. Fetched shard 269..320 with 1 cache hit, 51 live fetches, 3 retries; cache-only combined materialization grew corpus to 5,906 entries from 319/640 cached partitions. Gates passed.

title: Generate broader CLI corpus query grid
description: Replace manual-only corpus query growth with a generated objective GitHub query grid so discovery can scale toward the requested 10,000 CLI/tool repositories while preserving query provenance and tests.
close_reason: Added generated 640-partition objective corpus query grid, cache-only partial materialization controls, and refreshed the seed from 268 cached partitions to 5,183 entries. Full 640 live fetch remains incomplete due GitHub rate limits; tests and gates passed.

title: Expand corpus query grid toward 10k tools
description: Add more objective GitHub-star partitions to the CLI corpus discovery query grid and refresh the seed corpus with the resumable fetcher, moving from the current partial corpus toward the requested 10,000 tool inventory.
close_reason: Expanded objective GitHub-star query grid from 24 to 61 partitions, refreshed corpus from 1,379 to 2,980 entries with 59 cached partitions and 2 live replacement fetches on the final run, preserved modeled/agentic lifecycle claims, and passed fmt/clippy/corpus/generated/default/nu/performance gates.

title: Make corpus GitHub fetches resumable
description: Add a per-partition cache/resume path to the GitHub corpus seed fetcher so secondary rate limits do not throw away completed partition results while moving toward the 10k CLI corpus requirement.
close_reason: Added per-partition GitHub search cache/resume controls to the corpus fetcher; smoke verified 24 cached partitions were reused; corpus manifest, fmt, clippy, default tests, nu-plugin tests, generated matrix, and performance gate passed.

title: Fix corpus discovery query tokenization and expand seed corpus
description: Correct GitHub search query tokenization so each corpus partition is actually distinct, refresh the seed corpus from all configured partitions, and verify modeled/agentic lifecycle evidence survives the merge.
close_reason: Fixed GitHub query tokenization, refreshed corpus to 1,379 entries from 24 partitions, preserved git/ripgrep modeled agentic evidence, and passed fmt/clippy/default/nu/corpus/generated/performance test gates.

title: Expand corpus discovery without losing lifecycle evidence
description: Grow the GitHub CLI corpus seed with broader partition queries while preserving existing analyzed/modeled/deterministic/agentic lifecycle evidence across refreshes.
close_reason: Expanded query partitions and made corpus refresh preserve lifecycle/modeling evidence, with retry/backoff for GitHub secondary rate limits.

title: Add corpus agentic run evidence harness
description: Create an agentic/nondeterministic corpus run manifest and verifier, record initial exploratory runs for currently modeled git and ripgrep entries, and advance corpus lifecycle only where manifest evidence exists.
close_reason: Added agentic run evidence manifest and verifier; advanced git and ripgrep corpus entries to agentic-tested with matching manifest rows.

title: Model first top-corpus CLI entries
description: Advance the corpus lifecycle for concrete top-star CLI repos with descriptor fixture evidence, starting with existing git coverage and a new ripgrep output descriptor fixture.
close_reason: Advanced git/git and BurntSushi/ripgrep to analyzed/modeled/deterministic-tested with descriptor fixture evidence, including a new ripgrep executable-json fixture.

title: Add explicit corpus modeling lifecycle fields
description: Extend the CLI corpus manifest with measurable found/analyzed/modeled/deterministic/agentic lifecycle fields, update the fetcher and manifest checks, and document exact completion math toward the 10k goal.
close_reason: Corpus seed now has explicit found/analyzed/modeled/deterministic/agentic lifecycle fields with manifest checks and documented completion math.

title: Harden executable JSON plugin protocol
description: Add a versioned executable-json response envelope, enforce output-size and timeout limits, and add deterministic success/failure tests for plugin protocol behavior.
close_reason: Executable JSON plugins now support a v1 envelope and enforce timeout/stdout/stderr caps with deterministic failure tests.

title: Add descriptor-selected executable JSON parser plugins
description: Implement an explicit executable-json parser backend selected by descriptors, resolve plugin executable paths relative to descriptor files, run plugin processes over stdin/stdout JSON rows, and cover success/failure paths with tests.
close_reason: Added descriptor-selected executable-json parser backend with relative executable resolution, fixture plugin, CLI tests, schema, and docs.

title: Expose tool-pack loading in native Nu plugin
description: Add native Nushell plugin flags for declarative tool-pack directories, validate descriptor references through the shared CLI loader, and expose a list-tool-packs path so the data plugin surface is usable from Nu.
close_reason: Native Nu plugin now accepts declarative tool-pack dirs, validates descriptor refs through shared loader, and can list loaded tool packs.

title: Add ergonomic descriptor fixture testing utilities
description: Create reusable test utilities for descriptor/tool-pack fixture setup and assertions so future corpus/tool modeling can add isolated and registry coverage without hand-rolled tempdir and command boilerplate.
close_reason: Added reusable descriptor fixture support and refactored descriptor/Nix fixture tests onto it.

title: Add partitioned GitHub CLI corpus collector
description: Replace the single-query CLI corpus seed fetch with a partitioned collector that preserves source-query provenance, dedupes repositories, reranks by stars, and has manifest tests/docs.
close_reason: Implemented partitioned corpus collector, refreshed seed manifest, and added manifest checks/docs.

title: Fetch ranked GitHub CLI corpus seed
description: Move toward the 10,000 CLI/tool corpus requirement by adding a reproducible GitHub-star corpus collection script, fetching a larger checked-in seed batch from GitHub using objective star sorting and CLI-oriented search criteria, validating rank/star/order/uniqueness in tests, and documenting the remaining gap.
close_reason: Added reproducible GitHub-star CLI corpus collector script, fetched 100-entry seed using query 'topic:cli stars:>1000', stored source_query/fetched_at/stars/language/description, enforced rank/uniqueness/descending stars in tests, and documented path toward 10k corpus. Verified corpus_manifest plus full gates.

title: Add 2000-case deterministic parser test harness
description: Move toward the goal's explicit 2k+ total test requirement by adding an auditable deterministic integration harness that executes at least 2,000 distinct parser cases across delimiter, headers, sections, tree-sitter, fallback, and tool-pack validation surfaces, with a hard assertion on case count and docs/receipts.
close_reason: Added tests/generated_matrix.rs with a hard 2,000-case floor and 2,400 deterministic generated cases across delimiter parsing, first-row headers, fallback lines, sections backend, tree-sitter Rust backend, and tool-pack loader. Added docs/TEST-MATRIX.md and audit/spec references. Verified generated matrix prints 2400 cases and full gates pass.

title: Load and validate declarative tool packs
description: Make plugin loading as data operational, not just documented. Add config and CLI paths for tool-pack dirs, validate tool.toml files from expected directories, verify descriptor references against loaded descriptor registries, list loaded tool packs, add tests and docs, then push.
close_reason: Implemented operational plugin-as-data loading: config tool_pack_dirs, --tool-pack-dir, --validate-tool-pack-dir, --list-tool-packs, descriptor-reference validation, CLI tests, docs, corpus seed manifest and manifest checks. Verified live temp descriptor/tool-pack validation and listing plus full gates.

title: Design native runtime extension loading review
description: The original scope named arbitrary Rust runtime extension/plugin loading as not done. Project rules forbid adding dynamic native loading without a security and portability design review. Create the review artifact that defines threat model, ABI/platform constraints, trust boundaries, rejection/acceptance criteria, and the conditions required before any implementation could be considered.
close_reason: Added docs/NATIVE-RUNTIME-REVIEW.md and linked it from extension docs, audit, and OpenSpec. Native runtime loading remains rejected until explicit approval and ABI/security/portability/test gates are satisfied.

title: Implement tree-sitter parser backend after dependency approval
description: The original scope named a grammar engine as not done, and the current parser-backend research identifies tree-sitter as the fitting candidate. Implementation requires explicit approval for new dependencies: tree-sitter runtime crate plus at least one generated grammar package or checked-in generated grammar. Acceptance requires a descriptor-selected tree-sitter backend, fixtures, validation, trace ids, tests, and docs.
notes: Ramiro explicitly approved adding tree-sitter dependencies on 2026-06-15. Implement real descriptor-selected tree-sitter backend with runtime crate plus grammar dependency, fixture coverage, validation, stable trace ids, tests, and docs.
close_reason: Implemented approved tree-sitter backend using tree-sitter and tree-sitter-rust dependencies. Added tree-sitter-rust backend selection, stable trace ids, Rust declaration row extraction, CLI/descriptor fixture coverage, descriptor schema update, docs, tool-pack data model, and verification gates.

title: Produce deep prior-art research artifact
description: Research prior art for CLI table parsing, Nushell converters/plugins, descriptor-driven parsers, terminal table extraction, and safe extension architectures. Produce a source-grounded artifact with findings, tradeoffs, links, and implications for Golden Magic architecture.
close_reason: Added docs/PRIOR-ART.md with source-grounded research and architecture implications.

title: Design safe runtime extension architecture
description: Define Golden Magic's non-footgun extension architecture before any arbitrary Rust runtime plugin loading. Evaluate native loading risks, subprocess descriptors, WASM boundaries, portability, trust model, versioning, and sandbox behavior. Produce design docs and implementation criteria before code.
close_reason: Added docs/EXTENSIONS.md defining descriptor, subprocess, WASM/WASI, and forbidden native-loading boundaries. Native runtime loading remains unimplemented by design.

title: Implement grammar engine
description: Evaluate parser-backend options before implementing a grammar layer. Treat tree-sitter as the first serious candidate for structured, language-like, or nested CLI output where simple table heuristics are insufficient. Do not assume a custom grammar DSL is required. Deliverables must include source-grounded prior-art notes, a decision record comparing tree-sitter/custom grammar/nom-style parser combinators/current heuristics, a narrow prototype if the decision supports it, stable rule ids, fixtures, property tests, diagnostics, and descriptor integration. If tree-sitter is rejected, document why with evidence.
notes: Implemented dependency-free sections backend as first real non-table backend: ParseOptions::backend("sections") parses repeated section: <name> blocks plus key: value fields, emits backend.sections/backend.sections.parsed/backend.sections.malformed trace events, has unit/property/CLI/descriptor fixture coverage, and appears in --list-backends. Remaining work: tree-sitter support or evidence-backed rejection with measured dependency/build assessment.
close_reason: Implemented parser-backend/grammar-like parsing slice: backend selection in core, descriptor backend validation/listing, heuristic and sections backends, stable trace ids, sectioned fixture corpus, unit/property/CLI/descriptor tests, malformed-input diagnostics, and documented tree-sitter deferral with evidence and future-entry criteria.

title: Build known-tool descriptor corpus
description: Create a meaningful known-tool descriptor corpus with fixtures. Each vendored descriptor needs isolated fixture coverage, negative input, expected rows, and full-registry conflict coverage. Start with a representative set of real CLI outputs rather than only generic delimiter examples.
close_reason: Added a representative known-tool descriptor corpus with fixture coverage under the current descriptor schema. Grammar-heavy real outputs remain covered by golden-magic-2mf.

title: Implement descriptor-driven Nix fixture manifest harness
description: Replace the hardcoded optional Nix smoke with a manifest-driven harness for descriptor fixtures. The harness should read fixture metadata, enter nix shell with declared packages, run the declared command, parse through golden-magic with the fixture descriptor, compare expected rows, skip unless GOLDEN_MAGIC_RUN_NIX_FIXTURES=1, and document the format.
notes: Descriptor-driven nix.toml fixture discovery and parser comparison harness is implemented. Default cargo test still skips when GOLDEN_MAGIC_RUN_NIX_FIXTURES is absent. GOLDEN_MAGIC_RUN_NIX_FIXTURES=1 now requires a working nix binary and fails loudly if nix is missing instead of reporting a false pass. Verified host gates: cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy -- -D warnings, cargo test, cargo test --features nu-plugin, cargo test --test performance_gate -- --nocapture, and cargo test --test nix_fixture -- --nocapture. Verified live Nix fixture execution in a disposable nixos/nix:latest Docker container with the repository mounted read-only and Cargo outputs redirected to /tmp: GOLDEN_MAGIC_RUN_NIX_FIXTURES=1 cargo test --test nix_fixture -- --nocapture passed.
close_reason: Descriptor-driven Nix manifest harness implemented and live-verified with GOLDEN_MAGIC_RUN_NIX_FIXTURES=1 inside disposable nixos/nix:latest Docker container; host without nix now fails opt-in honestly instead of false-passing.

title: Add native Nu plugin descriptor and config loading
description: Native nu_plugin_golden_magic should support descriptor/config loading parity with the CLI path: explicit descriptor dirs, XDG/default config discovery, no-default opt-out, descriptor rule validation, selected descriptor trace, and integration coverage.
close_reason: Implemented native Nu plugin descriptor/config loading parity with integration coverage.

title: Create and push public GitHub repo
description: Create the matching public GitHub repository for Golden Magic and push the local git history after Ramiro explicitly approves the public side effect.
notes: Blocked pending explicit approval from Ramiro to create a public GitHub repository and push local history.
close_reason: Created public GitHub repository and pushed local history to origin/master.

title: Implement generic Golden Magic core
description: Rust parser core, CLI adapter, Nushell wrapper, descriptor registry/XDG config, tests, docs, and benchmark harness for the initial generic Golden Magic slice.
close_reason: Implemented initial generic core slice with CLI, Nu wrapper, descriptors, tests, docs, and benchmarks.

title: Investigate Criterion benchmark regression
description: Completion audit found that cargo bench --bench parser -- --sample-size 10 runs successfully but reports local Criterion baseline regressions while the hard performance gate passes. Investigate whether this is noise, stale baseline drift, or a real parser regression; update baselines only with an explicit tradeoff note.
close_reason: Investigated Criterion output: hard perf gate passes, Criterion exits 0, medium TSV shows small regression against untracked local target/criterion baseline while large/header improved. Documented current results and baseline policy in docs/PERFORMANCE.md without updating baselines.

title: Create extension-author SDK
description: Create documentation, schemas, validation tooling, examples, and test harness support for descriptor or future extension authors. Must cover descriptor authoring, fixture layout, rule ids, diagnostics, compatibility/versioning, and publishing guidance.
close_reason: Descriptor-pack SDK implemented with validation CLI, schema, docs, examples, fixture guidance, and CLI tests.

title: Build descriptor fixture harness
description: Create isolated descriptor fixture tests covering descriptor selection, negative matches, expected parsed output, and full-registry conflict behavior.
close_reason: Implemented descriptor fixture harness with isolated positive/negative fixtures, expected row assertions, and full-registry duplicate-id coverage.

title: Implement native Nushell plugin adapter
description: Replace or complement the CLI-backed nu/golden-magic.nu wrapper with a native Nushell plugin command shaped like from golden-magic, backed by the existing parser core.
close_reason: Added native nu_plugin_golden_magic binary exporting from golden-magic and integration-tested isolated Nu plugin registration/use.

title: Design debug instrumentation protocol
description: Security-review and document any harness-only debug channel before implementation; avoid hidden stdout/stderr interference.
close_reason: Documented debug instrumentation threat model, explicit trace-first policy, and strict gates for any future harness-only side channel.

title: Promote performance baselines into hard gates
description: Turn docs/PERFORMANCE.md baselines into explicit budgets and CI/check commands with acceptable tradeoff documentation.
close_reason: Added cargo-test performance regression gates and documented conservative budgets alongside Criterion baselines.

title: Add Nix-backed CLI fixture isolation
description: Design and implement optional Nix-based setup/teardown for tests that need real third-party CLIs without installing system-wide dependencies.
close_reason: Added optional Nix-backed integration fixture, opt-in execution gate, and documentation for non-system CLI isolation.
